subcodes.first_line: By the glory of God! O Beloved of my heart, were I to say "my spirit be a sacrifice unto Thee," I would be ashamed of these words, for they befit only that which perisheth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و عز الله یا محبوب قلبی لو اقول روحی لک الفداء و خجل عن هذا القول لانه یلیق للفناء
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @wisdom [hikmat], @consultation
